items.hook: Frank Woodley is an Australian comedian, author and musician who is best known for his work alongside Colin Lane as part of the comedic duo Lano and Woodley.
items.body: The two performed together for almost 20 years in live shows, a television series and an album of comedic songs, before deciding to pursue individual careers in 2006. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The first International Special Olympics Summer Games are held at Soldier Field in Chicago, with about 1,000 athletes with intellectual disabilities.
items.body: Special Olympics is the world's largest sports organization for children and adults with intellectual disabilities, providing year-round training and activities to 5 million participants and Unified Sports partners in 172 countries. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Chinese Communist Party begins a persecution campaign against Falun Gong, arresting thousands nationwide.
items.body: The persecution of Falun Gong is the campaign initiated in 1999 by the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) to eliminate the new religious movement Falun Gong in China, maintaining a doctrine of state atheism. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Syrian civil war: The People's Protection Units (YPG) capture the cities of Amuda and Efrîn without resistance.
items.body: The Syrian civil war was an armed conflict that began with the Syrian revolution in March 2011, when popular discontent with the Ba'athist regime ruled by Bashar al-Assad triggered large-scale protests and pro-democracy rallies across Syria, as part of the wider Arab Spring. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Barna Tikar is a village in Gauriganj block of Amethi district, Uttar Pradesh, India.
items.body: As of 2011, it has a population of 2,927 people, in 531 households. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: A fire in Oulu, Finland almost completely destroyed the fourth district, which covered the southern part of the city and was by far the largest of the city districts.
items.body: Oulu is a major port city in Finland and the regional capital of North Ostrobothnia. One of those things you can't un-know.
